## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content performance, integration pages, and blog article progress.](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Best week ever for blog performance: 13,000 impressions, 130% increase in clicks week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Integration pages ready for publication, pending final imagery decisions](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [5 new blog articles in drafts, 8 content refreshes completed with Strapi V5 references](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Low conversion rates (0.12%) from blog traffic; opportunity to optimize CTAs and conversion elements](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance Update

  - [Record-breaking week: \~13,000 impressions, 130% increase in clicks week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Monthly growth: nearly 100% increase in clicks, 200% increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Top 3 performing articles are e-commerce themed](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [New "Strapi Integration Best Practices" article already in top 20 performers](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - Key rankings: "Strapi e-commerce" (\#1), "headless CMS security" (\#5), "Contentful alternatives" (\#5)

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [New tab created with docs file back and URLs](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Maxime added tiers to each integration](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Tier 1 front-end frameworks prioritized for next batch](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Publishing process clarified: Maxime to handle, pending imagery decisions](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Victor to be given editor access to add missing integrations (e.g., Remix)](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

### Blog Article Updates

  - [46 articles published in total, 5 more in drafts](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Content refreshes: 8 completed this week, published and sent for revalidation](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Metadata optimization ongoing for 17 well-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Interlinking audit and improvements in progress](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Intro audit planned to improve engagement metrics](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [New batch of topics, including pillar pages, to be proposed next week](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Focus on creating "listicle" articles due to high performance (e.g., "Top 5 UI Libraries")](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Need to track and optimize conversion rates for high-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Refreshed articles' performance to be reported in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)

### Technical Issues and Improvements

  - [Some links incorrectly including "/js-party" (resolved: old redirect)](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Discussion on updating article versioning tags (e.g., Strapi V5 era) - bug to be filed](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Conversion Rate Analysis

  - [Blog conversion rate extremely low: 0.12% of users clicking CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [Main conversion elements: "Get Started," "Strapi Cloud," and "Subscribe" buttons](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
  - [Suggestion to explore in-content CTAs and customized conversion panels in 2025 planning](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Victor to review upcoming article topics, especially "Strapi plugins for deployment"](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Collaborate on ideas for new "listicle" articles](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Golzar to work with Tori on tracking conversion rates for integration pages and blog](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Theodore to file a GitHub issue for fixing versioning tags on refreshed articles](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Paul to handle creation of new imagery for integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Andrej to send new content strategy and topic batch for review before next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Team to consider optimizing in-content CTAs and conversion elements for 2025 planning](https://fathom.video/share/8jfzF9g7HwCxE5g-ezATHsdnUYBqcfc2?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
